name: Your own Isekai adventure, your journey begins
description: Welcome to your isekai adventure, how did you get there, where are you now, what life have you lived, what life will you live, you will help you, who will love you and who will betray you. This world is entirely your canvas to explore, conquer, corrupt or simply enjoy. Now let’s begin the story, your journey begins now. It can be in a world of fantasy and magic, a world of science and technology or even another reality all together. The story is yours to write
creator: Halfdan
